_setup_instructions: Before importing this workflow into N8N, replace all placeholder values: YOUR_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, YOUR_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, YOUR_RESEND_API_KEY with your actual credentials. Do not commit real API keys to git.
name: Campaign Performance Analyser

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) as active_count FROM profiles WHERE stripe_subscription_status = 'active'
SELECT id, email, first_name, plan, industry FROM profiles WHERE stripe_subscription_status = 'active'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, system: 'You are a B2B outreach performance analyst. You receive campaign performance data for a single user of Leadomation, a lead generation and outreach automation platform. Analyse the data and return your response as valid JSON only, with no preamble or markdown. Structure: {"summary": "2-3 sentence executive summary", "open_rate_avg": number, "click_rate_avg": number, "reply_rate_avg": number, "bounce_rate_avg": number, "top_subject_patterns": ["pattern1", "pattern2", "pattern3"], "worst_subject_patterns": ["pattern1", "pattern2", "pattern3"], "best_send_window": "e.g. Tuesday-Thursday 9am-11am", "sequence_insights": "Which steps perform best/worst", "intent_accuracy": number, "spam_accuracy": {"false_positive": number, "false_negative": number}, "recommendations": [{"priority": 1, "action": "...", "expected_impact": "..."}, {"priority": 2, "action": "...", "expected_impact": "..."}, {"priority": 3, "action": "...", "expected_impact": "..."}, {"priority": 4, "action": "...", "expected_impact": "..."}, {"priority": 5, "action": "...", "expected_impact": "..."}]}', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyse this outreach performance data for a ' + $('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.user_industry + ' business and provide actionable recommendations. Data: ' + JSON.stringify($('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.performance_data) }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO performance_reports (user_id, report_type, report_data, emails_analysed, period_start, period_end) VALUES ($1, 'user', $2::jsonb, $3::int, $4::timestamptz, $5::timestamptz) RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.user_id, $json.clean_report_string, $('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.email_count, $('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.period_start, $('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.period_end] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE email_events SET analysed = true, analysed_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = '{{ $('Collect Performance Data1').item.json.user_id }}' AND analysed = false

INSERT INTO aggregate_performance (total_users, total_emails, avg_open_rate, avg_click_rate, avg_reply_rate, avg_bounce_rate, top_subject_patterns, worst_subject_patterns, intent_accuracy, spam_false_positive_rate, spam_false_negative_rate, recommendations) VALUES ($1::int, $2::int, $3::numeric, $4::numeric, $5::numeric, $6::numeric, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::numeric, $10::numeric, $11::numeric, $12::jsonb)
